title: Configure tsa
description: Configure the TSA (RFC 3161 timestamp authority) module

host.description: Fully qualified domain name for the TSA, like 'tsa.example.org'

lets_encrypt.title: Let's Encrypt certificate

http2https.title: HTTP to HTTPS redirection
